summary_en: Board discussion on cost of capital, capital return metrics, and shareholder value strategy. Specific targets and initiatives not disclosed in header pages; details to follow in appendix.
title_en: Measures Toward Realizing Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Stock Price
translation_en_brief: On 20 May 2026, Konishi held a board meeting to discuss its cost of capital, capital return metrics, and current progress toward capital-efficient management. The company announced plans to outline measures aimed at realizing management conscious of cost of capital and stock price. Details of these measures are set forth in the attached appendix (not provided in the header pages extracted).
